rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the text by removing filler clauses and run-on sentences, making it more concise. However, some redundancies might remain, indicating a careful but not flawless copy-edit.
rationale.RX.1: The agent effectively marked uncertainty where necessary, such as sub-regional variations and prior study comparisons, showing thorough disclosure.
rationale.RX.3: The output strictly adheres to the requested scope without any deviations or additional topics introduced.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; all changes were focused on clarity and flow without errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: While major edits were noted, minor changes lacked specific traceability, falling short of comprehensive annotation.
